text: Arm one and three open the colored gate, while arm two retrieves the block. Arm one and three then open the subsequent gate, and arm two places the block within its mold.
Arm number two picks up the colored block and positions it near the subsequent gate, then wrists the instrument downwards for improved efficiency.
The robotic arms open the gates while the block is parked with arm number two. The camera is adjusted to provide a view of the mold where the block will be placed.
